title: Filipino-Style Shattering Eggplant Fritters
description: A twist on traditional eggplant fritters, this Filipino-inspired dish adds a sweet and savory flavor profile.
instructions: 1. Preheat oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (180°C).
2. Cut the eggplant into 1-inch cubes and set aside.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the fritter mix, Filipino-style breading mix, crushed crackers, and grated cheese.
4. Add the eggplant cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the mixture.
5. Using a spoon, drop small portions of the eggplant mixture into the hot oil.
6. Fry until golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes.
7. Remove from oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
